expect: PHIL-13 revision narrows claim to challenge-resolution only. P-025 either survives with evidence or gets DROP-flagged.
actual: PHIL-13 REVISED to dual-pathway formulation (evidence routes challenges, authority routes creation). P-025 PARTIALLY CONFIRMED: correctly identified intended coupling unreliable, but git co-occurrence also insufficient at low N. DEPS.md is a dead graph (0/6 edges validated).
diff: Expected PHIL-13 narrowed: DONE. Expected P-025 decisive test: got nuanced result — both intended and co-occurrence coupling fail. Deeper finding: DEPS.md K measurement is fictional.

objectives.description: Revise PHIL-13 claim text to reflect dual-pathway reality
objectives.actual: Claim revised from universal 'no authority' to dual-pathway. DROP criterion updated for both pathways. Challenge count 11→12.

objectives.description: First empirical test of founding-era P-025
